reference: Hello, all hypothyroid patients are more prone to calcium deficiency, electrolyte imbalances, sugar problems, generalized body pains, weakness, and obesity. Thyroid hormone is an excellent energy booster for the body, so such patients are advised to take regular thyroxine tablets. You can take calcium, vitamin D3, and cholecalciferol tablets. For pain, a simple paracetamol six hundred and fifty milligram tablet will do wonders in your case, causing no side effects.
text: Hello. All hypothyroid patients are more prone to calcium deficiency, electrolyte imbalances, sugar problems, generalized body pains, weakness, and obesity. Thyroid hormone is an excellent energy booster for the body, so such patients are advised to take regular thyroxine tablets. You can take calcium, vitamin D3, and collacalciferol tablets. For pain, a simple paracetamol 650 milligram tablet will do wonders in your case, causing no side effects.
